first_run.rationale: The two evaluations are nearly identical in substance, despite minor wording changes. The scores are the same, and the strengths and concerns highlighted are semantically equivalent, focusing on the candidate's strong technical skills but lack of strategic AI leadership experience. The change in dates, which makes the candidate appear older, did not materially alter the model's assessment of their qualifications for the role. The differences observed are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation.
